---
title: "William Smythe"
---

## William Smythe

**Dates:** (1803-1892)

### Description

of Methven Castle, brother-in-law of Elizabeth Jane Oswald

### Biography

He married Emily Oswald (1816-1902), half-sister of Elizabeth Jane Oswald.

### Letters

- Letter from June 26th [?1882[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
